TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ma-ke-s.Ka-al.En-a-te.Lu-te-wi-si.Pu-lang-ke "kamu nu Te-kow, Max Karl Ernst Ludwig Planck,Tekow pangiha, (maks 'plaŇčk) 1858 a mihca 4 a bulad 23 a demiad-1947 a mihca 10 a bulad 4 a demiad", Te-koe u-li sye-cya, lngan-ce-sye palekalay a tademaw. makaazih tu neng-lyang-lyang-ce pakala tu 1918 a mihcaan tu No-pey-al u-li-sye a kawlah "1919 a mihcaan pakawlah". Kasingangan ci Pu-lang-ke hina i 2019 a mihcaan mapaliyaw patatungus tu angangan sakaput,namahini iza henay singanganay a ke-sye kawlah,situngusay atu sye-huy. ť¶¨ŚÖčśĖĮ¬∑Ść°Áąĺ¬∑śĀ©śĖĮÁČĻ¬∑Ť∑ĮŚĺ∑Á∂≠ŚłĆ¬∑śôģśúóŚÖč(Śĺ∑Ť™ě:Max Karl Ernst Ludwig Planck,Śĺ∑Ť™ěÁôľťü≥:(maks 'plaŇčk) Ôľõ1858ŚĻī4śúą23śó•‚ÄĒ1947ŚĻī10śúą4śó•), . nilaculan ci Ma-ke-s.Pu-lang-ke lecuh i 1858 a mihca 4 a bulad 23 a dimiad nu Ci-al, u sakatusa acawa nu wama ina ci Ay-ma.pa-ci-si "Emma Patzig" 1821 a mihcaan-1914 a mihcaan" a nilecuhan,nisi-lian a nipangangan ci Ka-al.en-s-te.Lu-te-wi-si.m-Ke-S.Pu-lang-ke,zuma a nipangangan ci Ma-ke-s han, uyni satu ku ngangan ni Ma-ke-s katukuh kapatayan niza. (Emma Patzig,1821 , . ci Pu-lang-ke iza henay ku zuma enem a calekakaan zuma sepat a wawa ci He-al-man "Hermann"Si-al-te-cya-te "Hildegard", A-ta-al-pey-te "Adalbert" atu ci Aw-to "Otto" u sakatusa acawa nu wama a nilecuhan, saayaway acawa nu wama tatusa ku nisubelidan tu wawa ci Bu-ke "Hugo" atu ci Ay-ma "Emma". (Hermann),ŚłĆÁąĺŚĺ∑Śä†Śĺ∑(Hildegard),ťėŅťĀĒÁąĺŤ≤ĚÁČĻ(Adalbert)ŚíĆŚ•ßśČė ŚíĆŚüÉÁĎ™ . Pu-lang-ke i Ci-al mauzip tu kawawan a mihcaan tu saayaway tu pinaay a demoiadan, saayawasy anizateng niza i 1864 a mihcaan Pu-tan a kalalaisan, Pu-lu-s-Aw-ti-li pulung a hitay micumud I Ci-al. 1867 a mihcaan hamin nu luma' malimad tayza i Mu-ni-hey, Pu-lang-ke i Mu-ni-hey a Ma-ke-si-li-an-win-li-cung-sye micudad, itiza malilid nu su-sye-cye Aw-s-ka.bung.mi-le "Oskar von Miller" zikuz mala u patizengay a tademaw nu Te-i-ce a pow-u-kwan" nu palekalay, makeliday ku masakapahay henay a Ma-ke-s matineng u uzip manamuh tu sakay su-sye. ci Pu-lang-ke i 1874 a mihcaan i Mu-ni-hey malingatu tu u-lusye a picudad niza. ci Pu-lang-ke mamin a ke-sye a kawawan uyza kinapina a pigingkiw i Ye-li a caculculan malepun, migingkiw tu cin-ci i picunus tu akuti' zikuz pow-cung a kalupisak, nika ci Pu-lang-ke dadawa u pigingkiw pasayza tu li-lun-li-sye. 1877 a mihcaan katukuh 1878 a mihcaan, ci Pu-lang-ke maniyul tayza i Pow-lin micudada, i singanganay a u-li-si-ye-cya He-al-man. Bung.Hay-mu-he-ce, Ku-s-ta-bu.Low-pow-te.Ke-si-he-bu aci su-sye-cya ci Kal.wiy-al-s-te-las a caculculan minanam. makayniay ci Hay-mu-he-ce Pu-lang-ke namahini ku pisilit, "ayaw a micudad ciniza nacaay pisakapah milasul, picudadan pasubana' sapatupatut sa ku kamu, hina patelac ku piasip, tibahaw sa ku micudaday a micudad." "Te-wen uyaan a sulit, nie richtig vorbereitet, spricht stockend, verrechnet sich st√§ndig, langweilt seine H√∂rer." pakayniay ci Ke-bu-he-bu, Pu-lang-ke a nisulitan, "mahapinang ku pisakamu niza tu cudada, nika tibahaw sa." "Te-wen uyaan a sulit, sorgf√§ltig ausgearbeitete Vorlesung, jedoch trocken und eint√∂nig." 1877ŚĻīŤá≥1878ŚĻī, :nie richtig vorbereitet, spricht stockend, verrechnet sich st√§ndig, langweilt seine H√∂rer.) :sorgf√§ltig ausgearbeitete Vorlesung, jedoch trocken und eint√∂nig.) namahiza, ci Pu-lang-ke dadawa tu aci Hay-mu-he-ce, patizeng tu balucu'ay a kapahay a cabay. Ci Pu-lang-ke angangan makay Lu-taw-bu.Ke-law-siw-s a nisulitan uzip ku minanam, uyni malilid tu kahenulan a tademaw ze-li-sye ci tyen-ci, ze-li-sye li-lun mala sakay kitizaan mikawaw ni Pu-lngke. 1878 a mkihca 10 a bulad, Pu-lang-ke i Mu-ni-hye malepun tu ku seking kalasaydan, 1879 a mihca 2 a bulad pabeli tu ciniza tu pow-se-lun-wn "makayniay icelang nu akuti'-sye sakatusa a tin-li" "√úber den zweiten Hauptsatz der mechanischen W√§rmetheorie", satu pacena' ciniza tayza ayaw i Mu-ni-hey a nikitizaan a cacudadan, itiza pasumana' tu su-sye atu u-li-sye. 1880 a mihca 6 a bulad u lun-wn "pasayza kalecad a u-ce i cayay kalecad ku akuti' " "Gleichgewichtszust√§nde isotroper K√∂rper in verschiedenen Temperaturen" pakala tu matinengan pasubana' 1878ŚĻī10śúą, "(√úber den zweiten Hauptsatz der mechanischen W√§rmetheorie), "(Gleichgewichtszust√§nde isotroper K√∂rper in verschiedenen Temperaturen)Áć≤ŚĺóŚ§ßŚ≠łšĽĽśēôŤ≥áś†ľ. kabalakian a mihcaan zikuz pahezek tu sakatusa a kalalais, i pikelid ni En-s-te.te-al-sow "Ernst Telschow", Wi-lyen hungti matineng i nuayawan nu kakama ci Tin-ken amuliyaw patizeng, ci Pu-lang-ke ku situngusay tu wiyen huy-cu-si,1946 a mihca 4 a bulad 1 a demiad makay Ing-kow mapaydang taluma'ay anipakutayan ci Aw-to.haenan. uyza macalap nu Ing-kowtizaay a ce-hu saicelang sa pakutay ngangan nu sye-huy,uyni a sye-huy i 1946 a mihca 9 a bulad 11 a demiad sumad tu ngangan Ma-ke-s.Pu-lang-ke-sye-huy han, palangangan han tu cu-si ci Pu-lang-ke. kanahatu yadah tu ku kabiyalawan tu katanektek nu uzip, ci Pu-lang-ke mahiza tu tacuwacuwa a kitizaan mikawaw mitaliyuk papelu.1946 a mihca 7 a bulad, ci Pu-lang-ke mala u saayaway anitakus nu Te-kow a tademaw, milihiza tu hungti luma' sye-huy mikining pilecuhan ni Sen-tun tu 300 a mihcaan a kalimulak. 1947 a mihca 10 a bulad 4 a demiad, ci Pu-lang-ke namapulin atu kinapina makahung tu zikuz a adada patay satu, katukuh 89 ku mihcaan.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ma-k…ô-s.ka-ar~…ĺ.…ôn-a-t…ô.r~…ĺu-t…ô-wi-si.pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô "kamu nu t…ô-kow, ma* karr~…ĺ …ôrnst r~…ĺudwig pr~…ĺan ¶k,t…ôkow paŇčińßa, (maks Ē~ °pr~…ĺaŇčk) **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad-**** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad", t…ô-ko…ô u-r~…ĺi sj…ô- ¶ja, r~…ĺŇčan- ¶…ô-sj…ô par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. makaazińß tu n…ôŇč-r~…ĺjaŇč-r~…ĺjaŇč- ¶…ô pakar~…ĺa tu **** a mińß ¶aan tu no-p…ô-ar~…ĺ u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô a kawr~…ĺańß "**** a mińß ¶aan pakawr~…ĺańß". kasiŇčaŇčan ¶i pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô ńßina i **** a mińß ¶aan mapar~…ĺijaw patatuŇčus tu aŇčaŇčan sakaput,namańßini iza ńß…ônaj siŇčaŇčanaj a k…ô-sj…ô kawr~…ĺańß,situŇčusaj atu sj…ô-ńßuj. *******************(**:ma* karr~…ĺ …ôrnst r~…ĺudwig pr~…ĺan ¶k,****:(maks Ē~ °pr~…ĺaŇčk) **********************), . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ¶i ma-k…ô-s.pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a dimiad nu ¶i-ar~…ĺ, u sakatusa a ¶awa nu wama ina ¶i aj-ma.pa- ¶i-si "…ômma patzig" **** a mińß ¶aan-**** a mińß ¶aan" a nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan,nisi-r~…ĺian a nipaŇčaŇčan ¶i ka-ar~…ĺ.…ôn-s-t…ô.r~…ĺu-t…ô-wi-si.m-k…ô-s.pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô,zuma a nipaŇčaŇčan ¶i ma-k…ô-s ńßan, ujni satu ku ŇčaŇčan ni ma-k…ô-s katukuńß kapatajan niza. (…ômma patzig,**** , . ¶i pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô iza ńß…ônaj ku zuma …ôn…ôm a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkakaan zuma s…ôpat a wawa ¶i ńß…ô-ar~…ĺ-man "ńß…ôrmann"si-ar~…ĺ-t…ô- ¶ja-t…ô "ńßir~…ĺd…ôgard", a-ta-ar~…ĺ-p…ô-t…ô "adar~…ĺb…ôrt" atu ¶i aw-to "otto" u sakatusa a ¶awa nu wama a nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, saajawaj a ¶awa nu wama tatusa ku nisub…ôr~…ĺidan tu wawa ¶i bu-k…ô "ńßugo" atu ¶i aj-ma "…ômma". (ńß…ôrmann),*****(ńßir~…ĺd…ôgard),*****(adar~…ĺb…ôrt)*** *** . pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô i ¶i-ar~…ĺ mauzip tu kawawan a mińß ¶aan tu saajawaj tu pinaaj a d…ômoiadan, saajawasj anizat…ôŇč niza i **** a mińß ¶aan pu-tan a kar~…ĺar~…ĺaisan, pu-r~…ĺu-s-aw-ti-r~…ĺi pur~…ĺuŇč a ńßitaj mi ¶umud i ¶i-ar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan ńßamin nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mar~…ĺimad tajza i mu-ni-ńß…ô, pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô i mu-ni-ńß…ô a ma-k…ô-si-r~…ĺi-an-win-r~…ĺi- ¶uŇč-sj…ô mi ¶udad, itiza mar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu su-sj…ô- ¶j…ô aw-s-ka.buŇč.mi-r~…ĺ…ô "oskar *on mir~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôr" zikuz mar~…ĺa u patiz…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw nu t…ô-i- ¶…ô a pow-u-kwan" nu par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺaj, mak…ôr~…ĺidaj ku masakapańßaj ńß…ônaj a ma-k…ô-s matin…ôŇč u uzip manamuńß tu sakaj su-sj…ô. ¶i pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô i **** a mińß ¶aan i mu-ni-ńß…ô mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu u-r~…ĺusj…ô a pi ¶udad niza. ¶i pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô mamin a k…ô-sj…ô a kawawan ujza kinapina a pigiŇčkiw i j…ô-r~…ĺi a ¶a ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺan mar~…ĺ…ôpun, migiŇčkiw tu ¶in- ¶i i pi ¶unus tu akuti Ē~ ° zikuz pow- ¶uŇč a kar~…ĺupisak, nika ¶i pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô dadawa u pigiŇčkiw pasajza tu r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun-r~…ĺi-sj…ô. **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô manijur~…ĺ tajza i pow-r~…ĺin mi ¶udada, i siŇčaŇčanaj a u-r~…ĺi-si-j…ô- ¶ja ńß…ô-ar~…ĺ-man. buŇč.ńßaj-mu-ńß…ô- ¶…ô, ku-s-ta-bu.r~…ĺow-pow-t…ô.k…ô-si-ńß…ô-bu a ¶i su-sj…ô- ¶ja ¶i kar~…ĺ.wij-ar~…ĺ-s-t…ô-r~…ĺas a ¶a ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺan minanam. makajniaj ¶i ńßaj-mu-ńß…ô- ¶…ô pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô namańßini ku pisir~…ĺit, "ajaw a mi ¶udad ¶iniza na ¶aaj pisakapańß mir~…ĺasur~…ĺ, pi ¶udadan pasubana Ē~ ° sapatupatut sa ku kamu, ńßina pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ku piasip, tibańßaw sa ku mi ¶udadaj a mi ¶udad." "t…ô-w…ôn ujaan a sur~…ĺit, ni…ô ri ¶ńßtig *orb…ôr…ôit…ôt, spri ¶ńßt sto ¶k…ônd, *…ôrr…ô ¶ńßn…ôt si ¶ńß st*ndig, r~…ĺaŇčw…ôir~…ĺt s…ôin…ô ńß*r…ôr." pakajniaj ¶i k…ô-bu-ńß…ô-bu, pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô a nisur~…ĺitan, "mańßapinaŇč ku pisakamu niza tu ¶udada, nika tibańßaw sa." "t…ô-w…ôn ujaan a sur~…ĺit, sorgf*r~…ĺtig ausg…ôarb…ôit…ôt…ô *orr~…ĺ…ôsuŇč, j…ôdo ¶ńß tro ¶k…ôn und …ôint*nig." ***********, :ni…ô ri ¶ńßtig *orb…ôr…ôit…ôt, spri ¶ńßt sto ¶k…ônd, *…ôrr…ô ¶ńßn…ôt si ¶ńß st*ndig, r~…ĺaŇčw…ôir~…ĺt s…ôin…ô ńß*r…ôr.) :sorgf*r~…ĺtig ausg…ôarb…ôit…ôt…ô *orr~…ĺ…ôsuŇč, j…ôdo ¶ńß tro ¶k…ôn und …ôint*nig.) namańßiza, ¶i pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô dadawa tu a ¶i ńßaj-mu-ńß…ô- ¶…ô, patiz…ôŇč tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj a kapańßaj a ¶abaj. ¶i pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô aŇčaŇčan makaj r~…ĺu-taw-bu.k…ô-r~…ĺaw-siw-s a nisur~…ĺitan uzip ku minanam, ujni mar~…ĺir~…ĺid tu kańß…ônur~…ĺan a tad…ômaw z…ô-r~…ĺi-sj…ô ¶i tj…ôn- ¶i, z…ô-r~…ĺi-sj…ô r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun mar~…ĺa sakaj kitizaan mikawaw ni pu-r~…ĺŇčk…ô. **** a mkińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad, pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô i mu-ni-ńßj…ô mar~…ĺ…ôpun tu ku s…ôkiŇč kar~…ĺasajdan, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad pab…ôr~…ĺi tu ¶iniza tu pow-s…ô-r~…ĺun-wn "makajniaj i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu akuti Ē~ °-sj…ô sakatusa a tin-r~…ĺi" "*b…ôr d…ôn zw…ôit…ôn ńßauptsatz d…ôr m…ô ¶ńßanis ¶ńß…ôn w*rm…ôtńß…ôori…ô", satu pa ¶…ôna Ē~ ° ¶iniza tajza ajaw i mu-ni-ńß…ô a nikitizaan a ¶a ¶udadan, itiza pasumana Ē~ ° tu su-sj…ô atu u-r~…ĺi-sj…ô. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad u r~…ĺun-wn "pasajza kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a u- ¶…ô i ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku akuti Ē~ ° " "gr~…ĺ…ôi ¶ńßg…ôwi ¶ńßtszust*nd…ô isotrop…ôr k*rp…ôr in *…ôrs ¶ńßi…ôd…ôn…ôn t…ômp…ôratur…ôn" pakar~…ĺa tu matin…ôŇčan pasubana Ē~ ° ********, "(*b…ôr d…ôn zw…ôit…ôn ńßauptsatz d…ôr m…ô ¶ńßanis ¶ńß…ôn w*rm…ôtńß…ôori…ô), "(gr~…ĺ…ôi ¶ńßg…ôwi ¶ńßtszust*nd…ô isotrop…ôr k*rp…ôr in *…ôrs ¶ńßi…ôd…ôn…ôn t…ômp…ôratur…ôn)********. kabar~…ĺakian a mińß ¶aan zikuz pańß…ôz…ôk tu sakatusa a kar~…ĺar~…ĺais, i pik…ôr~…ĺid ni …ôn-s-t…ô.t…ô-ar~…ĺ-sow "…ôrnst t…ôr~…ĺs ¶ńßow", wi-r~…ĺj…ôn ńßuŇčti matin…ôŇč i nuajawan nu kakama ¶i tin-k…ôn amur~…ĺijaw patiz…ôŇč, ¶i pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô ku situŇčusaj tu wij…ôn ńßuj- ¶u-si,**** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad makaj iŇč-kow mapajdaŇč tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj anipakutajan ¶i aw-to.ńßa…ônan. ujza ma ¶ar~…ĺap nu iŇč-kowtizaaj a ¶…ô-ńßu sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa pakutaj ŇčaŇčan nu sj…ô-ńßuj,ujni a sj…ô-ńßuj i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad sumad tu ŇčaŇčan ma-k…ô-s.pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô-sj…ô-ńßuj ńßan, par~…ĺaŇčaŇčan ńßan tu ¶u-si ¶i pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô. kanańßatu jadańß tu ku kabijar~…ĺawan tu katan…ôkt…ôk nu uzip, ¶i pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô mańßiza tu ta ¶uwa ¶uwa a kitizaan mikawaw mitar~…ĺijuk pap…ôr~…ĺu.**** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, ¶i pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô mar~…ĺa u saajawaj anitakus nu t…ô-kow a tad…ômaw, mir~…ĺińßiza tu ńßuŇčti r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sj…ô-ńßuj mikiniŇč pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni s…ôn-tun tu *** a mińß ¶aan a kar~…ĺimur~…ĺak. **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, ¶i pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô namapur~…ĺin atu kinapina makańßuŇč tu zikuz a adada pataj satu, katukuńß ** ku mińß ¶aan.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ma-ke-s.Ka-al.En-a-te.Lu-te-wi-si.Pu-lang-ke "kamu nu Te-kow, Max Karl Ernst Ludwig Planck,Tekow pangiha, (maks 'plaŇčk) 1858 a mihca 4 a bulad 23 a demiad-1947 a mihca 10 a bulad 4 a demiad", Te-koe u-li sye-cya, lngan-ce-sye palekalay a tademaw. makaazih tu neng-lyang-lyang-ce pakala tu 1918 a mihcaan tu No-pey-al u-li-sye a kawlah "1919 a mihcaan pakawlah". Kasingangan ci Pu-lang-ke hina i 2019 a mihcaan mapaliyaw patatungus tu angangan sakaput,namahini iza henay singanganay a ke-sye kawlah,situngusay atu sye-huy. ť¶¨ŚÖčśĖĮ¬∑Ść°Áąĺ¬∑śĀ©śĖĮÁČĻ¬∑Ť∑ĮŚĺ∑Á∂≠ŚłĆ¬∑śôģśúóŚÖč(Śĺ∑Ť™ě:Max Karl Ernst Ludwig Planck,Śĺ∑Ť™ěÁôľťü≥:(maks 'plaŇčk) Ôľõ1858ŚĻī4śúą23śó•‚ÄĒ1947ŚĻī10śúą4śó•), . nilaculan ci Ma-ke-s.Pu-lang-ke lecuh i 1858 a mihca 4 a bulad 23 a dimiad nu Ci-al, u sakatusa acawa nu wama ina ci Ay-ma.pa-ci-si "Emma Patzig" 1821 a mihcaan-1914 a mihcaan" a nilecuhan,nisi-lian a nipangangan ci Ka-al.en-s-te.Lu-te-wi-si.m-Ke-S.Pu-lang-ke,zuma a nipangangan ci Ma-ke-s han, uyni satu ku ngangan ni Ma-ke-s katukuh kapatayan niza. (Emma Patzig,1821 , . ci Pu-lang-ke iza henay ku zuma enem a calekakaan zuma sepat a wawa ci He-al-man "Hermann"Si-al-te-cya-te "Hildegard", A-ta-al-pey-te "Adalbert" atu ci Aw-to "Otto" u sakatusa acawa nu wama a nilecuhan, saayaway acawa nu wama tatusa ku nisubelidan tu wawa ci Bu-ke "Hugo" atu ci Ay-ma "Emma". (Hermann),ŚłĆÁąĺŚĺ∑Śä†Śĺ∑(Hildegard),ťėŅťĀĒÁąĺŤ≤ĚÁČĻ(Adalbert)ŚíĆŚ•ßśČė ŚíĆŚüÉÁĎ™ . Pu-lang-ke i Ci-al mauzip tu kawawan a mihcaan tu saayaway tu pinaay a demoiadan, saayawasy anizateng niza i 1864 a mihcaan Pu-tan a kalalaisan, Pu-lu-s-Aw-ti-li pulung a hitay micumud I Ci-al. 1867 a mihcaan hamin nu luma' malimad tayza i Mu-ni-hey, Pu-lang-ke i Mu-ni-hey a Ma-ke-si-li-an-win-li-cung-sye micudad, itiza malilid nu su-sye-cye Aw-s-ka.bung.mi-le "Oskar von Miller" zikuz mala u patizengay a tademaw nu Te-i-ce a pow-u-kwan" nu palekalay, makeliday ku masakapahay henay a Ma-ke-s matineng u uzip manamuh tu sakay su-sye. ci Pu-lang-ke i 1874 a mihcaan i Mu-ni-hey malingatu tu u-lusye a picudad niza. ci Pu-lang-ke mamin a ke-sye a kawawan uyza kinapina a pigingkiw i Ye-li a caculculan malepun, migingkiw tu cin-ci i picunus tu akuti' zikuz pow-cung a kalupisak, nika ci Pu-lang-ke dadawa u pigingkiw pasayza tu li-lun-li-sye. 1877 a mihcaan katukuh 1878 a mihcaan, ci Pu-lang-ke maniyul tayza i Pow-lin micudada, i singanganay a u-li-si-ye-cya He-al-man. Bung.Hay-mu-he-ce, Ku-s-ta-bu.Low-pow-te.Ke-si-he-bu aci su-sye-cya ci Kal.wiy-al-s-te-las a caculculan minanam. makayniay ci Hay-mu-he-ce Pu-lang-ke namahini ku pisilit, "ayaw a micudad ciniza nacaay pisakapah milasul, picudadan pasubana' sapatupatut sa ku kamu, hina patelac ku piasip, tibahaw sa ku micudaday a micudad." "Te-wen uyaan a sulit, nie richtig vorbereitet, spricht stockend, verrechnet sich st√§ndig, langweilt seine H√∂rer." pakayniay ci Ke-bu-he-bu, Pu-lang-ke a nisulitan, "mahapinang ku pisakamu niza tu cudada, nika tibahaw sa." "Te-wen uyaan a sulit, sorgf√§ltig ausgearbeitete Vorlesung, jedoch trocken und eint√∂nig." 1877ŚĻīŤá≥1878ŚĻī, :nie richtig vorbereitet, spricht stockend, verrechnet sich st√§ndig, langweilt seine H√∂rer.) :sorgf√§ltig ausgearbeitete Vorlesung, jedoch trocken und eint√∂nig.) namahiza, ci Pu-lang-ke dadawa tu aci Hay-mu-he-ce, patizeng tu balucu'ay a kapahay a cabay. Ci Pu-lang-ke angangan makay Lu-taw-bu.Ke-law-siw-s a nisulitan uzip ku minanam, uyni malilid tu kahenulan a tademaw ze-li-sye ci tyen-ci, ze-li-sye li-lun mala sakay kitizaan mikawaw ni Pu-lngke. 1878 a mkihca 10 a bulad, Pu-lang-ke i Mu-ni-hye malepun tu ku seking kalasaydan, 1879 a mihca 2 a bulad pabeli tu ciniza tu pow-se-lun-wn "makayniay icelang nu akuti'-sye sakatusa a tin-li" "√úber den zweiten Hauptsatz der mechanischen W√§rmetheorie", satu pacena' ciniza tayza ayaw i Mu-ni-hey a nikitizaan a cacudadan, itiza pasumana' tu su-sye atu u-li-sye. 1880 a mihca 6 a bulad u lun-wn "pasayza kalecad a u-ce i cayay kalecad ku akuti' " "Gleichgewichtszust√§nde isotroper K√∂rper in verschiedenen Temperaturen" pakala tu matinengan pasubana' 1878ŚĻī10śúą, "(√úber den zweiten Hauptsatz der mechanischen W√§rmetheorie), "(Gleichgewichtszust√§nde isotroper K√∂rper in verschiedenen Temperaturen)Áć≤ŚĺóŚ§ßŚ≠łšĽĽśēôŤ≥áś†ľ. kabalakian a mihcaan zikuz pahezek tu sakatusa a kalalais, i pikelid ni En-s-te.te-al-sow "Ernst Telschow", Wi-lyen hungti matineng i nuayawan nu kakama ci Tin-ken amuliyaw patizeng, ci Pu-lang-ke ku situngusay tu wiyen huy-cu-si,1946 a mihca 4 a bulad 1 a demiad makay Ing-kow mapaydang taluma'ay anipakutayan ci Aw-to.haenan. uyza macalap nu Ing-kowtizaay a ce-hu saicelang sa pakutay ngangan nu sye-huy,uyni a sye-huy i 1946 a mihca 9 a bulad 11 a demiad sumad tu ngangan Ma-ke-s.Pu-lang-ke-sye-huy han, palangangan han tu cu-si ci Pu-lang-ke. kanahatu yadah tu ku kabiyalawan tu katanektek nu uzip, ci Pu-lang-ke mahiza tu tacuwacuwa a kitizaan mikawaw mitaliyuk papelu.1946 a mihca 7 a bulad, ci Pu-lang-ke mala u saayaway anitakus nu Te-kow a tademaw, milihiza tu hungti luma' sye-huy mikining pilecuhan ni Sen-tun tu 300 a mihcaan a kalimulak. 1947 a mihca 10 a bulad 4 a demiad, ci Pu-lang-ke namapulin atu kinapina makahung tu zikuz a adada patay satu, katukuh 89 ku mihcaan.

(…ômma patzig,**** , . ¶i pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô iza ńß…ônaj ku zuma …ôn…ôm a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkakaan zuma s…ôpat a wawa ¶i ńß…ô-ar~…ĺ-man "ńß…ôrmann"si-ar~…ĺ-t…ô- ¶ja-t…ô "ńßir~…ĺd…ôgard", a-ta-ar~…ĺ-p…ô-t…ô "adar~…ĺb…ôrt" atu ¶i aw-to "otto" u sakatusa a ¶awa nu wama a nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, saajawaj a ¶awa nu wama tatusa ku nisub…ôr~…ĺidan tu wawa ¶i bu-k…ô "ńßugo" atu ¶i aj-ma "…ômma".
